author: Athenox14
name: BitNet b1.58 + Depth Recurrence + NorMuon
blurb: BitNet b1.58 ternary weights with depth recurrence (4 unique blocks × 3 passes = 12 effective layers), U-Net skip connections, NorMuon optimizer, sequence length warmup with YaRN, and 2-bit ternary packing. 3.78 MB submission.
